# Re-Importing the "Example Schedule"

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418664

## Overview

When you first create a Helium account, an example schedule is automatically added to help you explore the app's features. If you've cleared this data and want to bring it back, you can re-import it at any time.

  1. Open [**Settings → Import / Export**](https://app.heliumedu.com/settings)
  2. Scroll down to **Import / Export** and click it
  3. Click **Re-Import Example Schedule**

The example data will be imported alongside your existing data in separate groups — it won't overwrite anything already in your account.

## Clearing the Example Schedule

To remove the example schedule from your account:

  1. Refresh any page (or close and re-open the app)
  2. Once the **Welcome to Helium** dialog appears, click **Clear Example Data**

## Related Articles

  * [Using Exports to Backup Data & Move Between Accounts](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418665)
  * [What Is Included in a Helium Backup (and What Isn't)?](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418666)

---

## Helium Classic

In Helium Classic, the steps are similar:

  1. Sign in to your account
  2. Navigate to **Account → Settings → Import/Export**
  3. Select the re-import option

To remove the example schedule, navigate to the **Calendar** and click **Delete Example Schedule** in the **Welcome to Helium** dialog. This dialog appears each time you land on the Calendar page until you clear the example data.

__Helium Classic will remain available until July 31, 2026.__
